name: Raisin Nougat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Lemon Flavoring with Yellow Coloring
1/2 tsp Raspberry Flavoring with Pink Coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, white corn syrup, and water in a heavy pot.
2. Bring to boil without stirring until it reaches the hard crack stage (285 - 290 F).
3. Remove from heat and stir marshmallow fluff rapidly until light and fluffy.
4. Add cocoa butter; mix well.
5. Stir in coloring, flavoring, and raisins.
6. Pour into a buttered pan.
7. Spread to about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut into squares.
